title: VeloraOS 1.10.0 - Image Studio V2
releaseNotes: Adds a private local ComfyUI image workspace with installed-checkpoint detection and clear engine readiness states.
Adds prompt, negative prompt, size, steps, guidance, sampler, scheduler and seed controls.
Adds per-user image history with full-size previews, downloads and deletion.
Preserves accounts, chats, settings, avatars, models, licensing, device identity, mobile accessibility and secure rollback updates.
